subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Good thoughts, good resolves, and good deeds bring men nearer to God, and that is heaven. Hell is the state of mind in which there are evil thoughts
subcodes.subjects: @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @nearness and remoteness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation
